name: Brockon Credit Repair Denver
description_short: Depina Credit Solutions is a credit repair company based in Brockton, MA that disputes errors on credit reports and provides credit counseling to help consumers improve their scores.
description_long:
Depina Credit Solutions is a national credit counseling and coaching company headquartered in Brockton, Massachusetts. The company specializes in credit repair and financial education, positioning itself as a service for consumers who have experienced financial setbacks such as collections, charge-offs, late payments, repossessions, foreclosures, public records, and bankruptcy. Their core mission centers on helping consumers become creditworthy again by challenging inaccurate or unverifiable data on credit reports.

The company offers three primary service lines: free credit reviews and consultations, professional credit repair through disputes sent to credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion), and credit building guidance through credit counseling and education. Depina performs detailed credit audits that identify incomplete, outdated, or incorrect information eligible for dispute. They promise results within 30-45 days for many clients and claim most customers graduate within six months. Their credit repair service includes crafting customized disputes on behalf of clients and, if initial disputes fail, escalating disputes to creditors and collection agencies directly at no additional charge.

Depina differentiates itself through several claims: no upfront charges for dispute services, free re-audits at each stage, direct contact with creditors and collection agencies using "advanced tactics," and a commitment to continue fighting after initial disputes if items are not removed. They also emphasize helping clients achieve "lender-ready credit" by understanding what lenders seek in credit profiles. The company provides a detailed action plan after the credit audit that outlines negative accounts, potential errors, and improvement strategies tailored to individual financial goals.

However, important caveats apply. The website makes aggressive claims about timelines ("results as fast as 30 days") that may not apply uniformly to all clients. The company's pricing is not transparent on the website—only services and processes are detailed. No independent verification of their dispute success rates or client outcomes is provided. Consumers should verify that Depina is properly licensed and compliant with credit repair organization laws (CROA) in their state before engaging services, as this information is not clearly displayed on the website.
pros: Offers completely free credit review and consultation with no obligation
Claims results within 30-45 days with most clients graduating in under six months
Provides free re-audits at every stage if disputes fail
Disputes sent directly to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Will escalate disputes to creditors and collection agencies directly with no extra charge
Includes credit building and education services alongside dispute assistance
Creates customized action plans tailored to individual financial goals and credit profiles
cons: Pricing structure and service costs are not disclosed on the website
No specific licensing, credentials, or CROA compliance information displayed
Aggressive marketing claims ("results as fast as 30 days") may set unrealistic expectations
No independent verification of dispute success rates or client testimonials provided
Business address is in Brockton, MA but company claims national service—unclear service area limitations
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items (collections, charge-offs, late payments) seeking comprehensive disputes
Individuals in Massachusetts or nearby states wanting local credit repair support
Borrowers preparing for mortgage or auto loan applications and needing credit improvement quickly
diagnosis: Depina Credit Solutions is best for consumers with multiple negative items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance and don't mind working with a local Massachusetts-based company. The main caveat is that pricing is not transparent, licensing/credentials are not displayed, and aggressive timeline claims should be treated cautiously—credit repair timelines vary significantly by individual circumstance and dispute complexity.
services: Free professional credit review and consultation
Detailed credit audit analyzing Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion reports
Custom action plan creation based on credit profile and financial goals
Dispute drafting and submission to credit bureaus on client behalf
Direct negotiation with creditors and collection agencies
Credit dispute escalation if initial disputes unsuccessful
Free re-audits at every dispute stage
Credit score improvement targeting (30-90 day timeline)
Identity and error investigation on credit reports
